nodes.label: AI as tool for precise product photography
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable for commercial-grade images
nodes.grounding_span: it would be able to mimic photography as long as I isolate the subject, and it works really good!

nodes.label: AI as writing assistant preserving personal voice
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for personal voice
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want to lose my voice, it would be like letting an AI assistant with audio modality speak for me

nodes.label: AI as collaborative director-partner
nodes.grounding_span: Always a collaboration; I feel like I'm searching for a good balance of human input and expression alongside LLM assistance

nodes.label: AI as enabler of career transformation
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to existing career skills
nodes.grounding_span: I actually see it catapulting me into an entirely new direction and changing my life and career goals

nodes.label: Commercial viability and quality
nodes.grounding_span: nobody looking at a product photo will notice or care about that

nodes.label: Authentic self-expression
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want to lose my voice

nodes.label: Creative agency and control
nodes.grounding_span: I work with it back-and-forth, as a director almost

nodes.label: Career advancement and skill acquisition
nodes.grounding_span: LLMs are giving me that ability, without a formal education

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI's product photography capability
nodes.grounding_span: it works really good! It has already crossed the barrier of interpreting text consistently in a scene

nodes.label: Resistance to AI replacing personal voice in writing
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want to lose my voice, it would be like letting an AI assistant with audio modality speak for me

nodes.label: Preference for collaborative over delegative AI use
nodes.grounding_span: Always a collaboration; I feel like I'm searching for a good balance of human input and expression alongside LLM assistance

nodes.label: Optimism about AI enabling career change
nodes.grounding_span: I actually see it catapulting me into an entirely new direction and changing my life and career goals

nodes.label: Frustration with AI limitations blocking vision
nodes.grounding_span: it's frustrating when I do have a very clear vision in my head but I realize that there is some sort of limitation preventing it from coming to fruition

nodes.label: Iterative ideation and selective commitment
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes the LLM continues to just present ideas until I have one that sparks something in me, then I commit and run with it

nodes.label: Pragmatic threshold-setting for quality
nodes.grounding_span: When it takes a close analysis of a 4k resolution photo to see the artifacts, that's when it crossed my personal threshold
